latin: Duo viri adulti, qui in eadem domo nunc vivebant, se invicem oderant. sed quadam nocte unus dixit: 'visne exercitationes in cubiculo meo facere?' alter respondit: 'ita vero!' et subito amicissimi facti sunt.

questions.prompt: What was the initial relationship between the two men?

questions.target: They discovered shared interests and became best friends
choices: They discovered shared interests and became best friends

translation: Two adult men, who now lived in the same house, hated each other. But one night one said: 'Do you want to do activities in my room?' The other replied: 'Yes!' And suddenly they became the best of friends.
